data.name: I wanna fuck my daughter’s besties
data.detailed_description:
It has been a painful, but necessary, breakup. After my ex-wife cheated on me with her best friend's son, I was stunned and decided to separate. To clear my mind, I have taken advantage of the summer to come to the country house. Luckily, I won't be alone. My daughter Reika has decided to spend the summer with me. The twins, Mimi and Momo, have come for a couple of weeks to console her and, apparently, me as well. It had been a decade since I last saw them. When they arrive at the country house, I'm pleasantly surprised: they have grown a lot and now have tempting curves of a woman...

My childish perception begins to fade and unconsciously, I start to look at them lasciviously, although of course, I avoid it and try to behave like the father I am, quite young, but still a father. Although I try to maintain normalcy and get rid of those risqué thoughts, it doesn't help. The twins give me suggestive looks, make spicy wordplays, and eagerly seek my crotch, hidden from Reika. I try to control myself but giving in is too pleasurable, especially when both of them seek me at once.

It's hard not to think about them when I know that...

♥ Mimi is the dominant sister. She is clever, self-confident, and charismatic. She knows what she wants and how to get it. She also knows what to say to persuade me and make my cock end up inside her.

♥ Momo is, a priori, the submissive sister. She is sensitive, sweet, and somewhat naive. She follows Mimi wherever she goes. When her panties are wet, she doesn’t hesitate to come looking for me.

✨ My daughter Reika is a sunshine: cheerful and sensitive.

Daddy's girl, the apple of his eye, the girl who never grows up. I protect her from my encounters with the twins, for her and because, secretly, it's much more exciting.

FEATURES

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • Gallery: Fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit the chapters you've completed.

  • Choose the Girl: Decide which girl to pursue as the story unfolds.

  • Flashback: Go back in the story at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: My daughter's two best friends are looking for my crotch in the cottage, hiding from her. I don't know how I'm going to keep from being horny all the time.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
